div.p: AoS (Array of Structs): Non-contiguous access (stride-7) defeats cache prefetchers and SIMD lane loading. SoA (Struct of Arrays): Contiguous memory access enables AVX-256 (8 x 32-bit floats per instruction).

ul.li: SIMD Problem: Elements span across multiple 64B cache lines.
Hardware: Prefetcher cannot predict stride-7 effectively.
SIMD Benefit: 32 bytes (8 floats) can be loaded in one burst.

g.text: Requires 8 separate cache line requests or slow Gather instruction.
Single `VMOVAPS` loads all 8 lanes at peak throughput.
vfmadd213ps ymm0, ymm1, ymm2 ; 8 x FMA (Add+Mul)
